query:
INSERT INTO minecraft_device_tokens (id, uuid, private_key, x, y, issue_instant, not_after, token, display_claims)
            VALUES (0, $1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8)
            ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET
                uuid = $1,
                private_key = $2,
                x = $3,
                y = $4,
                issue_instant = $5,
                not_after = $6,
                token = $7,
                display_claims = json($8)
